summary: Tested Phase 1 Adviser Portal Core Enhancements: Portfolio Rebalancing page, Workflow Automation component, and Compliance/Audit Tools. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Portfolio Rebalancing page loads at /portfolio-rebalancing
Portfolio Rebalancing - Navigation link visible in sidebar under Shares section
Portfolio Rebalancing - Analysis tab shows Current vs Target Allocation chart and Allocation Radar chart
Portfolio Rebalancing - Drift Analysis section shows asset classes with current/target percentages
Portfolio Rebalancing - Target Allocation tab shows 5 risk profiles (Conservative, Moderately Conservative, Balanced, Growth, High Growth)
Portfolio Rebalancing - Custom targets switch toggles custom allocation sliders
Portfolio Rebalancing - Rebalancing Trades tab shows suggested trades with amounts and CGT estimates
Portfolio Rebalancing - Settings tab has Rebalancing Threshold slider, Include Super switch, Tax-Aware switch
Portfolio Rebalancing - Export Plan button present
Portfolio Rebalancing - Alert banner shows 'Rebalancing Recommended' with drift percentage
Practice Management - All 8 tabs visible (Dashboard, Tasks, Meetings, Time, Billing, Automation, Audit, Compliance)
Workflow Automation - Start Workflow button opens dialog
Workflow Automation - Dialog has template select with 4 templates (Onboarding, Annual Review, Compliance, Meeting Follow-up)
Workflow Automation - Dialog has client select with 5 mock clients
Workflow Automation - Starting workflow creates active workflow with progress tracking
Workflow Automation - Active workflow shows current step, due date, and Complete button
Workflow Automation - Pause/Resume workflow buttons work
Workflow Automation - Automation Rules section with 5 configurable rules
Compliance Audit Tools - Audit Log tab shows activity timeline with timestamps
Compliance Audit Tools - Log Activity button opens dialog to add new activities
Compliance Audit Tools - Export button for audit log
Compliance Audit Tools - Search and category filter for activities
Compliance Audit Tools - KYC/AML Checklist tab shows verification items by category
Compliance Audit Tools - KYC items have checkboxes with Mandatory badges
Compliance Audit Tools - KYC progress bar shows completion percentage
Compliance Audit Tools - Compliance Status tab shows all clients with risk levels
Compliance Audit Tools - AFSL Compliance Summary shows stats (Fully Compliant, In Progress, Needs Attention, Audit Entries)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data and localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested Phase 1 Adviser Portal features. Portfolio Rebalancing page at /portfolio-rebalancing with 4 tabs (Analysis, Target Allocation, Rebalancing Trades, Settings). Workflow Automation in Practice Management Automation tab with 4 workflow templates. Compliance Audit Tools in Practice Management Audit tab with 3 sub-tabs (Audit Log, KYC/AML Checklist, Compliance Status). All data is MOCKED using localStorage. Set localStorage key 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to bypass compliance modal.

mocked_apis.Portfolio Rebalancing: MOCKED - Uses calculated values from portfolio context, not real market data
mocked_apis.Workflow Automation: MOCKED - Workflows stored in localStorage, no backend persistence
mocked_apis.Compliance Audit Tools: MOCKED - Activity log and KYC status stored in localStorage

tests: Page loads with header and summary cards
Analysis tab with bar chart and radar chart
Drift Analysis section with asset class breakdown
Target Allocation tab with 5 risk profiles
Rebalancing Trades tab with trade suggestions
Settings tab with threshold, super, and tax switches
Active workflow display with current step
Audit Log tab with activity timeline
Compliance Status overview for all clients
